## Meeting Purpose

[Daily CM standup to discuss content strategy, article progress, and challenges with AI-assisted writing for Prophecy.](https://fathom.video/share/9oC4t7h4i_ncgRiyJDKBJu8YvTsEvXWE?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Saskia struggling with article focus and tying content back to Prophecy's offerings](https://fathom.video/share/9oC4t7h4i_ncgRiyJDKBJu8YvTsEvXWE?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Ehtisham introduced new thought leadership-oriented content direction](https://fathom.video/share/9oC4t7h4i_ncgRiyJDKBJu8YvTsEvXWE?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Team aiming to deliver 4 articles this week, slightly behind on publishing schedule](https://fathom.video/share/9oC4t7h4i_ncgRiyJDKBJu8YvTsEvXWE?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Atlas AI tool limitations affecting content quality and workflow efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/9oC4t7h4i_ncgRiyJDKBJu8YvTsEvXWE?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### Article Focus and Relevance

  - [Confusion about focusing on data migration broadly vs. data platform changes specifically](https://fathom.video/share/9oC4t7h4i_ncgRiyJDKBJu8YvTsEvXWE?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [Challenge in relating general data migration topics to Prophecy's specific ETL and modernization offerings](https://fathom.video/share/9oC4t7h4i_ncgRiyJDKBJu8YvTsEvXWE?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Decision to discuss data migration in general, mentioning platforms as a major use case](https://fathom.video/share/9oC4t7h4i_ncgRiyJDKBJu8YvTsEvXWE?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)
  - [Suggestion to tie in Prophecy's ETL migration and modernization capabilities at the end of the article](https://fathom.video/share/9oC4t7h4i_ncgRiyJDKBJu8YvTsEvXWE?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)

### Content Strategy Shift

  - [Moving towards thought leadership content instead of keyword-focused articles](https://fathom.video/share/9oC4t7h4i_ncgRiyJDKBJu8YvTsEvXWE?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
  - [New topics focus on organizational-level data usage and industry discussions](https://fathom.video/share/9oC4t7h4i_ncgRiyJDKBJu8YvTsEvXWE?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
  - [Ehtisham created a sheet with new topic ideas aligned with this direction](https://fathom.video/share/9oC4t7h4i_ncgRiyJDKBJu8YvTsEvXWE?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Matt (likely a stakeholder) approved of this new content direction](https://fathom.video/share/9oC4t7h4i_ncgRiyJDKBJu8YvTsEvXWE?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)

### AI Writing Challenges

  - [Difficulty in getting Atlas AI to follow specific instructions for article structure](https://fathom.video/share/9oC4t7h4i_ncgRiyJDKBJu8YvTsEvXWE?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
  - [Struggle to influence AI output to match desired quality and flow](https://fathom.video/share/9oC4t7h4i_ncgRiyJDKBJu8YvTsEvXWE?tab=summary&timestamp=823.0)
  - [Need for better input options in Atlas to guide AI-generated content](https://fathom.video/share/9oC4t7h4i_ncgRiyJDKBJu8YvTsEvXWE?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
  - [Suggestion to document Atlas improvement ideas via screenshots and feature requests](https://fathom.video/share/9oC4t7h4i_ncgRiyJDKBJu8YvTsEvXWE?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)

### Workload and Deadlines

  - [Aiming to complete 4 articles this week](https://fathom.video/share/9oC4t7h4i_ncgRiyJDKBJu8YvTsEvXWE?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Saskia working on finishing at least one article today](https://fathom.video/share/9oC4t7h4i_ncgRiyJDKBJu8YvTsEvXWE?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
  - [Ehtisham to edit all articles by end of day](https://fathom.video/share/9oC4t7h4i_ncgRiyJDKBJu8YvTsEvXWE?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Articles to be moved to client review section in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/9oC4t7h4i_ncgRiyJDKBJu8YvTsEvXWE?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
  - [Slight backlog in client reviews and publishing of previous week's articles](https://fathom.video/share/9oC4t7h4i_ncgRiyJDKBJu8YvTsEvXWE?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)

### Industry Trends

  - [Decreasing effectiveness of AI-generated overviews and basic content](https://fathom.video/share/9oC4t7h4i_ncgRiyJDKBJu8YvTsEvXWE?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Shift towards thought leadership as AI handles more top-of-funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/9oC4t7h4i_ncgRiyJDKBJu8YvTsEvXWE?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Recognition that competitors may struggle with thought leadership content](https://fathom.video/share/9oC4t7h4i_ncgRiyJDKBJu8YvTsEvXWE?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
